Welcome to DJ ZR

YouTube Mixcloud

About DJ ZR

DJing has been in my blood since the late 80s/early 90s, and even though I don’t play live anymore, the passion for dance music has never gone away. This channel is all about the mixes I create from the music I love most — fresh tracks, record pool discoveries, festival-inspired energy, and sets I’d want to play loud myself. I upload mixes across bass house, tech house, nu-disco, mainstage and hard house, shaped by a lifelong love of club culture and the EDM festival scene. Inspired by the atmosphere of events I still attend like Tomorrowland, AMF and Don’t Let Daddy Know, these mixes are made for anyone who loves big energy, strong flow and great dance music without the filler. I make them for me first — and share them for anyone else who wants to come along for the ride.

Featured Content

Three featured picks linking straight to current highlighted sets.

Mixcloud

Pre-Release Big Room April 2026

If you love massive builds, euphoric melodies and a closing stretch that goes absolutely off, this one is made to hit loud. Festival-house at the front, rave-fuelled chaos at the back—exactly how a big room set should move. From the first vocal lift to the final all-out rave rush, this mix is built for giant stages, fireworks, hands-in-the-air moments and that pure festival euphoria. It opens with sleek, melodic mainstage energy from Sam Feldt, AFROJACK, David Guetta, Zedd and the huge John Newman rework from DubVision & Third Party, then keeps climbing with Matisse & Sadko’s progressive emotion, Mathame’s cinematic tension and the darker punch of Eli Brown. By the time Hardwell, Ryos, Bassjackers and Maddix take over, the set flips into full end-of-night mode—faster, harder and impossible to stand still to. The closing run, finishing on Makina Time, feels like a Tomorrowland mainstage afterburner: peak-time drops, rave pressure, singalong hooks and zero let-up.

 YouTube

Neo-90s House

Neo-90s House — modern house, rebuilt with 90s muscle memory. Afro House style warmth and disco shimmer set the tone, then tech-house bite, chunky basslines and classic vocal flips. Piano stabs, filter sweeps, garage swing, gospel lift… and a rave-leaning peak when you least expect it. Stepping into a new lane: taking current club weapons and re-writing them as if they were cut onto a 1998 white label—cleaner, louder, but with the same grin. Press play: sunshine → sweat → euphoria.

 YouTube

High-Energy Pop Party Mix

Turn it up — this is a high-energy pop party mix built for pre-drinks, house parties, gym sessions and late-night drives. Featuring music and remixes from: Taylor Swift, Sabrina Carpenter, Chappell Roan, Dua Lipa, Charli XCX, Olivia Rodrigo, Tate McRae, Britney Spears, Beyoncé, Coldplay, Martin Garrix, Illenium, Tiësto, David Guetta and more.
